title: Echos of the Garden
description: Adds life and a reason to go into pale gardens by adding shrines and ruins
body:
![Echos of the Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/547a6beffe52314f4397596fd5ef91bc63682a05.png)

### **I highly recomend using [Better Creaking](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-creaking) in combination with this mod**

Adds a few custom structures and Ruins throughout Pale Gardens, including a custom new item that can be found.

Shrines spawn in the forest. They let out a dull humming sound to make them easier to find. In the center of the shrines you can find a powerful relic.

Some of the Structures that spawn can be found in the gallery

<details>
<summary>Custom Item Spoiler</summary>

![Nights Solace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/044924ca0f0c85fe23cf380d66643d7032d670ec.png)

Duping the Night's Solace
- Throw a Night's Solace, a netherite ingot, and a chiseled resin brick on the ground to duplicate the Night's Solace.
- Demonstration can be found in the gallery.

</details>
